evidence.description: From mid-1988 until Khomeini's death in June 1989, Ahmad Khomeini was one of three co-decision-makers on all state affairs alongside Khamenei and Rafsanjani. Their coordination soured after Khomeini's death, with non-government sources claiming Ahmad was eventually killed for falling foul of Khamenei.

editorial_notes: Coordinated in the 1988-1989 period; relationship deteriorated sharply post-1989 succession.
